title: anthoxanthum odoratum subsp. ovatum
intro: Anthoxanthum odoratum subsp. ovatum, commonly known as sweet vernal grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family (Poaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. The health benefits of sweet vernal grass include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and congestion. Sweet vernal grass can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies for various health ailments.
